      ‎index_live_finnhub.html‎

      Copy file name to clipboard
      +101Lines changed: 101 additions & 0 deletions
      Original file line numberDiff line numberDiff line change
      @@ -0,0 +1,101 @@
      1+
      <!doctype html>
      2+
      <html>
      3+
      <head>
      4+
      <meta charset="utf-8">
      5+
      <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
      6+
      <title>Q's LightBoard Live</title>
      7+
      <style>
      8+
      body{font-family:Arial,sans-serif;background:#111827;color:white;margin:0;padding:20px;text-align:center}
      9+
      .box{max-width:460px;margin:0 auto;background:#1f2937;padding:20px;border-radius:16px}
      10+
      input{width:90%;padding:14px;font-size:22px;text-align:center;text-transform:uppercase;border-radius:10px;border:none;margin-bottom:12px}
      11+
      button{width:94%;padding:14px;font-size:20px;font-weight:bold;border:none;border-radius:10px;background:#2563eb;color:white;margin-bottom:18px}
      12+
      .ticker{font-size:28px;font-weight:bold;margin-bottom:10px}
      13+
      .price{font-size:22px;margin-bottom:15px;color:#d1d5db}
      14+
      .lights{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:18px}
      15+
      .light{width:60px;height:60px;border-radius:50%;background:#6b7280;border:3px solid #d1d5db}
      16+
      .green{background:#16a34a}.yellow{background:#ca8a04}.red{background:#dc2626}.gray{background:#6b7280}
      17+
      .decision{font-size:34px;font-weight:bold;padding:15px;border-radius:12px;background:#374151;margin-bottom:12px}
      18+
      .details{background:#0f172a;border-radius:12px;padding:12px;font-size:15px;color:#cbd5e1;text-align:left;line-height:1.6}
      19+
      .note{color:#9ca3af;margin-top:15px;font-size:12px}
      20+
      </style>
      21+
      </head>
      22+
      <body>
      23+
      <div class="box">
      24+
      <h1>Q's LightBoard Live</h1>
      25+
      <p>Private operator version</p>
      26+
      <input id="ticker" placeholder="TICKER">
      27+
      <button onclick="checkTicker()">CHECK LIVE DATA</button>
      28+
      <div class="ticker" id="tickerName">---</div>
      29+
      <div class="price" id="priceLine">Price: ---</div>
      30+
      <div class="lights">
      31+
      <div id="l1" class="light gray"></div>
      32+
      <div id="l2" class="light gray"></div>
      33+
      <div id="l3" class="light gray"></div>
      34+
      <div id="l4" class="light gray"></div>
      35+
      </div>
      36+
      <div id="decision" class="decision">READY</div>
      37+
      <div class="details" id="details">Enter a ticker to pull Finnhub quote data.</div>
      38+
      <div class="note">Private beta. Paper-trading only. Not financial advice.</div>
      39+
      </div>
      40+
      <script>
      41+
      var FINNHUB_API_KEY=d85jo7hr01qitd92bbpgd85jo7hr01qitd92bbq0;
      42+
      var manualSignals={
      43+
      "ARRNF":{lights:["green","green","green","green"],note:"Rare earth setup. Manual logic: GO."},
      44+
      "RDW":{lights:["green","green","green","green"],note:"Space/defense setup. Manual logic: GO."},
      45+
      "SMR":{lights:["green","green","green","green"],note:"Nuclear theme. Manual logic: GO."},
      46+
      "TSM":{lights:["green","green","green","green"],note:"AI semiconductor infrastructure. Manual logic: GO."},
      47+
      "MP":{lights:["yellow","green","green","green"],note:"Rare earth leader. Manual logic: SET."},
      48+
      "USAR":{lights:["yellow","green","green","green"],note:"Rare earth momentum. Manual logic: SET."},
      49+
      "PATH":{lights:["yellow","green","green","green"],note:"AI automation. Manual logic: SET."},
      50+
      "AI":{lights:["yellow","green","green","green"],note:"Enterprise AI. Manual logic: SET."},
      51+
      "RCAT":{lights:["yellow","green","green","green"],note:"Defense drone theme. Manual logic: SET."},
      52+
      "ASTS":{lights:["yellow","green","green","green"],note:"Space/mobile network theme. Manual logic: SET."},
      53+
      "LUNR":{lights:["yellow","green","green","green"],note:"Lunar/NASA theme. Manual logic: SET."},
      54+
      "REEMF":{lights:["yellow","green","yellow","green"],note:"Rare earth watch. Manual logic: READY/SET border."},
      55+
      "TMRC":{lights:["yellow","green","yellow","green"],note:"Rare earth breakout watch."},
      56+
      "METC":{lights:["yellow","green","yellow","green"],note:"Cyclical value setup."},
      57+
      "ATALF":{lights:["red","yellow","yellow","green"],note:"Needs confirmed funding/contract catalyst."},
      58+
      "MVIS":{lights:["red","yellow","yellow","green"],note:"Speculative. Needs traction."},
      59+
      "PL":{lights:["red","yellow","yellow","green"],note:"Space data/speculative. Weak confirmation."},
      60+
      "DNOW":{lights:["yellow","green","green","green"],note:"Industrial/energy service setup. Manual logic: SET."},
      61+
      "ALGM":{lights:["yellow","green","green","green"],note:"Auto/industrial semiconductor setup. Manual logic: SET."},
      62+
      "LASR":{lights:["yellow","green","yellow","green"],note:"Defense/laser watch. Manual logic: READY/SET border."},
      63+
      "BHE":{lights:["red","yellow","yellow","green"],note:"Weakening speculative holding."},
      64+
      "BNMR":{lights:["red","red","yellow","yellow"],note:"Red flag speculative holding."},
      65+
      "VOYG":{lights:["red","yellow","yellow","green"],note:"Speculative space watch."}
      66+
      };
      67+
      async function checkTicker(){
      68+
      var ticker=document.getElementById("ticker").value.toUpperCase().trim();
      69+
      if(!ticker)return;
      70+
      document.getElementById("tickerName").innerHTML=ticker;
      71+
      document.getElementById("priceLine").innerHTML="Loading live price...";
      72+
      document.getElementById("details").innerHTML="Fetching Finnhub quote...";
      73+
      var lights=manualSignals[ticker]?manualSignals[ticker].lights.slice():["gray","gray","gray","gray"];
      74+
      var note=manualSignals[ticker]?manualSignals[ticker].note:"No manual LightBoard rule loaded yet.";
      75+
      try{
      76+
      var url="https://finnhub.io/api/v1/quote?symbol="+encodeURIComponent(ticker)+"&token="+FINNHUB_API_KEY;
      77+
      var response=await fetch(url);
      78+
      var data=await response.json();
      79+
      if(!data||!data.c||data.c===0){
      80+
      document.getElementById("priceLine").innerHTML="Price: unavailable";
      81+
      document.getElementById("details").innerHTML="Finnhub did not return a valid price. Check ticker format, OTC support, or API key.";
      82+
      setLights(lights);setDecision(lights);return;
      83+
      }
      84+
      var current=data.c;
      85+
      var previousClose=data.pc||0;
      86+
      var changePct=previousClose?((current-previousClose)/previousClose*100):0;
      87+
      document.getElementById("priceLine").innerHTML="Price: $"+current.toFixed(2)+" ("+changePct.toFixed(2)+"%)";
      88+
      if(changePct<=-5)lights[0]="red";else if(changePct>=3&&lights[0]!=="green")lights[0]="yellow";
      89+
      setLights(lights);
      90+
      var decision=setDecision(lights);
      91+
      document.getElementById("details").innerHTML="Live price: $"+current.toFixed(2)+"<br>Previous close: $"+previousClose.toFixed(2)+"<br>Day change: "+changePct.toFixed(2)+"%<br>LightBoard note: "+note+"<br>Signal: "+decision;
      92+
      }catch(err){
      93+
      document.getElementById("priceLine").innerHTML="Price: error";
      94+
      document.getElementById("details").innerHTML="Error fetching live data. Check API key, ticker, internet access, or hosting restrictions.";
      95+
      setLights(lights);setDecision(lights);
      96+
      }}
      97+
      function setLights(lights){for(var i=0;i<4;i++){document.getElementById("l"+(i+1)).className="light "+lights[i];}}
      98+
      function setDecision(lights){var greens=0;for(var i=0;i<lights.length;i++){if(lights[i]==="green")greens++;}var decision="READY";if(greens===4)decision="GO";else if(greens===3)decision="SET";document.getElementById("decision").innerHTML=decision;return decision;}
      99+
      </script>
      100+
      </body>
      101+
      </html>
      Collapse file

      ‎inner-frame-minified.html‎

      +14Lines changed: 14 additions & 0 deletions

      @@ -0,0 +1,14 @@

      <!DOCTYPE html>
      2+
      <!-- saved from url=(0259)https://901274299-atari-embeds.googleusercontent.com/embeds/16cb204cf3a9d4d223a0a3fd8b0eec5d/inner-frame-minified.html?jsh=m%3B%2F_%2Fscs%2Fabc-static%2F_%2Fjs%2Fk%3Dgapi.lb.en.gSqfLc8WnvU.O%2Fd%3D1%2Frs%3DAHpOoo_cXXGArE2dtw6vkGR2NQ_1f5L3AQ%2Fm%3D__features__ -->
      3+
      <html><head><meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=windows-1252">
      4+
      <style>body,html,iframe{margin:0;padding:0;height:100%;width:100%;overflow:hidden}.forceIosScrolling{overflow:scroll;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch}</style>

      8+
      <iframe id="userHtmlFrame" frameborder="0" scrolling="yes" style="overflow: auto;" src="./saved_resource.html">
      9+

      10+
      11+
      <script>function loadGapi(){var loaderScript=document.createElement('script');loaderScript.setAttribute('src','https://apis.google.com/js/api.js?checkCookie=1');loaderScript.onload=function(){this.onload=function(){};loadGapiClient();};loaderScript.onreadystatechange=function(){if(this.readyState==='complete'){this.onload();}};(document.head||document.body||document.documentElement).appendChild(loaderScript);}function updateUserHtmlFrame(userHtml,enableInteraction,forceIosScrolling){var frame=document.getElementById('userHtmlFrame');if(enableInteraction){if(forceIosScrolling){var iframeParent=frame.parentElement;iframeParent.classList.add('forceIosScrolling');}else{frame.style.overflow='auto';}}else{frame.setAttribute('scrolling','no');frame.style.pointerEvents='none';}clearCookies();clearStorage();frame.contentWindow.document.open();frame.contentWindow.document.write('<base target="_blank">'+userHtml);frame.contentWindow.document.close();}function onGapiInitialized(){gapi.rpc.call('..','innerFrameGapiInitialized');gapi.rpc.register('updateUserHtmlFrame',updateUserHtmlFrame);}function loadGapiClient(){gapi.load('gapi.rpc',onGapiInitialized);}if(document.readyState=='complete'){loadGapi();}else{self.addEventListener('load',loadGapi);}function clearCookies(){var cookies=document.cookie.split(";");for(var i=0;i<cookies.length;i++){var cookie=cookies[i];var equalPosition=cookie.indexOf("=");var name=equalPosition>-1?cookie.substr(0,equalPosition):cookie;document.cookie=name+"=;expires=Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:00 GMT";document.cookie=name+"=;expires=Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:01 GMT ;domain=.googleusercontent.com";}}function clearStorage(){try{localStorage.clear();sessionStorage.clear();}catch(e){}}</script>
      12+
      13+
      14+
      </body></html>

      @@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
      1+
      <!DOCTYPE html>
      2+
      <!-- saved from url=(0255)https://www.gstatic.com/atari/embeds/83a60601c213b72fb19c1855fb0c5f26/intermediate-frame-minified.html?jsh=m%3B%2F_%2Fscs%2Fabc-static%2F_%2Fjs%2Fk%3Dgapi.lb.en.gSqfLc8WnvU.O%2Fd%3D1%2Frs%3DAHpOoo_cXXGArE2dtw6vkGR2NQ_1f5L3AQ%2Fm%3D__features__&r=188741136 -->
      3+
      <html><head><meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=windows-1252">
      4+
      <style>body,html,iframe{margin:0;padding:0;height:100%;width:100%;overflow:hidden}.forceIosScrolling{overflow:scroll;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch}</style>
      5+
      <script src="./cb=gapi.loaded_0" async=""></script><script src="./api.js" gapi_processed="true"></script></head>
      6+

      <body>
      8+
      <iframe id="innerFrame" name="innerFrame" sandbox="allow-scripts allow-popups allow-forms allow-same-origin allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox allow-downloads allow-storage-access-by-user-activation" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen="" src="./inner-frame-minified.html" style="overflow: auto;">
      9+
      </iframe>
      10+
      11+
      <script>function loadGapi(){var loaderScript=document.createElement('script');loaderScript.setAttribute('src','https://apis.google.com/js/api.js?checkCookie=1');loaderScript.onload=function(){this.onload=function(){};loadGapiClient();};loaderScript.onreadystatechange=function(){if(this.readyState==='complete'){this.onload();}};(document.head||document.body||document.documentElement).appendChild(loaderScript);}function updateInnerFrame(url,enableInteraction,forceIosScrolling){var urlEl=document.createElement('a');urlEl.setAttribute('href',url);if(urlEl.protocol!="https:"&&urlEl.protocol!="http:"){return;}var iframe=document.getElementById('innerFrame');iframe.src=url;iframe.onload=function(){gapi.rpc.call('..','innerFrameLoaded');};if(enableInteraction){if(forceIosScrolling){var iframeParent=iframe.parentElement;iframeParent.classList.add('forceIosScrolling');}else{iframe.style.overflow='auto';}}else{iframe.style.pointerEvents='none';}}function updateInnerIframeCode(userCode,enableInteraction,forceIosScrolling){gapi.rpc.setup('innerFrame');gapi.rpc.call('innerFrame','updateUserHtmlFrame',undefined,userCode,enableInteraction,forceIosScrolling);}function onPostMessage(ev){if(ev.data['magic']!='SHIC'){return;}var type=ev.data['type'];switch(type){case'resize':var height=ev.data['height'];gapi.rpc.call('..','resize',undefined,height);}}function onGapiInitialized(){gapi.rpc.call('..','gapiInitialized');gapi.rpc.register('updateInnerFrame',updateInnerFrame);gapi.rpc.register('updateInnerIframeCode',updateInnerIframeCode);window.addEventListener('message',onPostMessage);}function loadGapiClient(){gapi.load('gapi.rpc',onGapiInitialized);}if(document.readyState=='complete'){loadGapi();}else{self.addEventListener('load',loadGapi);}</script>
      12+
      13+
      14+
      </body></html>

      @@ -0,0 +1,224 @@
      1+
      2+
      <!-- saved from url=(0259)https://901274299-atari-embeds.googleusercontent.com/embeds/16cb204cf3a9d4d223a0a3fd8b0eec5d/inner-frame-minified.html?jsh=m%3B%2F_%2Fscs%2Fabc-static%2F_%2Fjs%2Fk%3Dgapi.lb.en.gSqfLc8WnvU.O%2Fd%3D1%2Frs%3DAHpOoo_cXXGArE2dtw6vkGR2NQ_1f5L3AQ%2Fm%3D__features__ -->
      3+
      <html lang="en"><head><meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=UTF-8"><!--<base target="_blank">--><base href="." target="_blank">
      4+
      5+
      6+
      7+
      <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
      8+
      <title>Light Board Beta</title>
      9+
      <style>
      10+
      body {
      11+
      font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;
      12+
      background: #111827;
      13+
      color: white;
      14+
      margin: 0;
      15+
      padding: 20px;
      16+
      }
      17+
      .app {
      18+
      max-width: 430px;
      19+
      margin: auto;
      20+
      background: #1f2937;
      21+
      border-radius: 24px;
      22+
      padding: 20px;
      23+
      box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.35);
      24+
      }
      25+
      h1 {
      26+
      font-size: 26px;
      27+
      margin: 0 0 6px;
      28+
      }
      29+
      .sub {
      30+
      color: #9ca3af;
      31+
      margin-bottom: 18px;
      32+
      }
      33+
      input {
      34+
      width: 100%;
      35+
      font-size: 24px;
      36+
      padding: 14px;
      37+
      border-radius: 14px;
      38+
      border: none;
      39+
      box-sizing: border-box;
      40+
      text-transform: uppercase;
      41+
      margin-bottom: 14px;
      42+
      }
      43+
      button {
      44+
      width: 100%;
      45+
      font-size: 22px;
      46+
      padding: 14px;
      47+
      border-radius: 14px;
      48+
      border: none;
      49+
      font-weight: 800;
      50+
      background: #2563eb;
      51+
      color: white;
      52+
      margin-bottom: 20px;
      53+
      }
      54+
      .ticker {
      55+
      font-size: 28px;
      56+
      font-weight: 900;
      57+
      margin-bottom: 12px;
      58+
      }
      59+
      .lights {
      60+
      display: grid;
      61+
      grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
      62+
      gap: 10px;
      63+
      margin-bottom: 18px;
      64+
      }
      65+
      .light {
      66+
      height: 82px;
      67+
      border-radius: 18px;
      68+
      display: flex;
      69+
      flex-direction: column;
      70+
      justify-content: center;
      71+
      align-items: center;
      72+
      font-weight: 800;
      73+
      font-size: 14px;
      74+
      }
      75+
      .green { background: #16a34a; }
      76+
      .yellow { background: #ca8a04; }
      77+
      .red { background: #dc2626; }
      78+
      .gray { background: #4b5563; }
      79+
      80+
      .decision {
      81+
      font-size: 30px;
      82+
      font-weight: 900;
      83+
      text-align: center;
      84+
      padding: 18px;
      85+
      border-radius: 18px;
      86+
      margin-bottom: 14px;
      87+
      }
      88+
      .go { background: #16a34a; }
      89+
      .wait { background: #6b7280; }
      90+
      .sell { background: #dc2626; }
      91+
      92+
      .data {
      93+
      background: #111827;
      94+
      border-radius: 16px;
      95+
      padding: 14px;
      96+
      color: #d1d5db;
      97+
      font-size: 16px;
      98+
      line-height: 1.6;
      99+
      }
      100+
      .small {
      101+
      font-size: 13px;
      102+
      color: #9ca3af;
      103+
      margin-top: 14px;
      104+
      }
      105+
      </style>
      106+
      </head>
      107+
      <body>
      108+
      <div class="app">
      109+
      <h1>🚦 Light Board</h1>
      110+
      <div class="sub">Enter ticker. Read blocks. Act only on GO.</div>
      111+
      112+
      <input id="tickerInput" placeholder="Enter ticker">
      113+
      <button onclick="checkTicker()">CHECK</button>
      114+
      115+
      <div class="ticker" id="tickerDisplay">PL</div>
      116+
      117+
      <div class="lights">
      118+
      <div class="light gray" id="priceLight">PRICE<br>⚪</div>
      119+
      <div class="light gray" id="volumeLight">VOLUME<br>⚪</div>
      120+
      <div class="light gray" id="newsLight">NEWS<br>⚪</div>
      121+
      <div class="light gray" id="marketLight">MARKET<br>⚪</div>
      122+
      </div>
      123+
      124+
      <div class="decision wait" id="decision">WAIT</div>
      125+
      126+
      <div class="data" id="supportData">Price vs Level: Ticker not in beta list<br>5D Move: —<br>Volume vs Avg: —<br>Catalyst: Needs live data connection</div>
      127+
      128+
      <div class="small">
      129+
      Beta prototype: lights are sample rule outputs. Connect live market/news data later.
      130+
      </div>
      131+
      </div>
      132+
      133+
      <script>
      134+
      const sampleData = {
      135+
      "ARRNF": {
      136+
      lights: ["green","green","green","green"],
      137+
      decision: "GO BUY",
      138+
      price: "$0.27 vs $0.48 level (-44%)",
      139+
      move: "+15% (1m)",
      140+
      volume: "1.3× volume",
      141+
      catalyst: "Halleck Creek rare-earth momentum"
      142+
      },
      143+
      "REEMF": {
      144+
      lights: ["yellow","green","green","green"],
      145+
      decision: "WAIT",
      146+
      price: "$0.69 vs $0.62 level (+11%)",
      147+
      move: "+3% (5d)",
      148+
      volume: "1.1× volume",
      149+
      catalyst: "Rare-earth development active"
      150+
      },
      151+
      "TMRC": {
      152+
      lights: ["yellow","green","yellow","green"],
      153+
      decision: "WAIT",
      154+
      price: "$1.02 vs $0.95 level (+7%)",
      155+
      move: "+6% (5d)",
      156+
      volume: "1.2× volume",
      157+
      catalyst: "USAR / Round Top theme active"
      158+
      },
      159+
      "ATALF": {
      160+
      lights: ["red","yellow","yellow","green"],
      161+
      decision: "WAIT",
      162+
      price: "Catalyst-only trigger",
      163+
      move: "+5% (5d)",
      164+
      volume: "1.4× volume",
      165+
      catalyst: "No confirmed funding/contract"
      166+
      },
      167+
      "ASTS": {
      168+
      lights: ["yellow","green","green","green"],
      169+
      decision: "HOLD / IMPROVING",
      170+
      price: "Owned recovery position",
      171+
      move: "+7% (5d)",
      172+
      volume: "1.5× volume",
      173+
      catalyst: "Space/carrier momentum improving"
      174+
      }
      175+
      };
      176+
      177+
      function checkTicker() {
      178+
      const ticker = document.getElementById("tickerInput").value.toUpperCase().trim();
      179+
      const data = sampleData[ticker] || {
      180+
      lights: ["gray","gray","gray","gray"],
      181+
      decision: "WAIT",
      182+
      price: "Ticker not in beta list",
      183+
      move: "—",
      184+
      volume: "—",
      185+
      catalyst: "Needs live data connection"
      186+
      };
      187+
      188+
      document.getElementById("tickerDisplay").innerText = ticker || "—";
      189+
      190+
      const ids = ["priceLight","volumeLight","newsLight","marketLight"];
      191+
      const labels = ["PRICE","VOLUME","NEWS","MARKET"];
      192+
      ids.forEach((id, i) => {
      193+
      const el = document.getElementById(id);
      194+
      el.className = "light " + data.lights[i];
      195+
      el.innerHTML = labels[i] + "<br>" + lightEmoji(data.lights[i]);
      196+
      });
      197+
      198+
      const decision = document.getElementById("decision");
      199+
      decision.innerText = data.decision;
      200+
      decision.className = "decision " + decisionClass(data.decision);
      201+
      202+
      document.getElementById("supportData").innerHTML =
      203+
      "Price vs Level: " + data.price + "<br>" +
      204+
      "5D Move: " + data.move + "<br>" +
      205+
      "Volume vs Avg: " + data.volume + "<br>" +
      206+
      "Catalyst: " + data.catalyst;
      207+
      }
      208+
      209+
      function lightEmoji(color) {
      210+
      if (color === "green") return "🟢";
      211+
      if (color === "yellow") return "🟡";
      212+
      if (color === "red") return "🔴";
      213+
      return "⚪";
      214+
      }
      215+
      216+
      function decisionClass(text) {
      217+
      if (text.includes("GO")) return "go";
      218+
      if (text.includes("SELL")) return "sell";
      219+
      return "wait";
      220+
      }
      221+
      </script>
      222+
      223+
      224+
      </body></html>
      Collapse file
